EmailTemplate.name: EOI Payment - Customer
EmailTemplate.subject: EOI Payment
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Primary_First_Name__c} {!RW_EOI__c.RW_Primary_Last_Name__c},
This is with reference to your Payment received in our system. We are glad to inform you that we have received a payment of Rs {!Amount} from your end towards EOI. Thank You for the prompt payment
You may call on {!SMPhoneNumber} for any assistance.
Regards, Runwal Group
